---
title: "Fig1B_cohort flow"
author: "Kanako Terakawa"
date: "2026-05-21"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# Figure 1B — Cohort and sample flow
# GWR / DKD spatial transcriptomics manuscript (Terakawa et al.)
#
# Pure ggplot2 (+ grid for arrows). No exotic packages required.
# Rounded boxes are drawn with a self-contained helper (geom_polygon),
# so the script runs without ggchicklet / DiagrammeR / etc.
#
# Output: PNG (300 dpi) and PDF (vector), publication style.
# Tweak the marked PARAMETERS block to adjust spacing / colours / fonts.

library(ggplot2)
library(grid)   # unit(), arrow()

## ---- (optional) Arial-like font ---------------------------------------------
## To match the other manuscript figures, uncomment and set a font.
## Requires the 'showtext' package (install locally; not needed to run otherwise).
# library(showtext)
# font_add_google("Inter", "Inter")   # or use a locally installed Arial
# showtext_auto()
# base_family <- "Inter"
base_family <- ""   # "" = default sans; set to "Arial"/"Helvetica" if available

# PARAMETERS ------------------------------------------------------------------
col_x   <- c(Susztak = 2, KPMP_DKD = 5.5, KPMP_HKD = 9)  # column centres (pitch 3)
box_w   <- 2.8                                          # box width
# row centres (top -> bottom) and heights
y_head  <- 6.4; h_head <- 0.60
y_total <- 5.30; h_box  <- 0.90
y_qc    <- 3.70
y_deg   <- 2.00; h_deg  <- 1.00
corner_r <- 0.13                                        # rounded-corner radius

# cohort palette: header (solid + white text), border, light tint, dark text
pal <- list(
  Susztak  = list(header = "#1F3864", border = "#1F3864", tint = "#E8EEF6", text = "#1F3864"),
  KPMP_DKD = list(header = "#ED7D31", border = "#C55A11", tint = "#FBE9DA", text = "#B5560F"),
  KPMP_HKD = list(header = "#138D75", border = "#0E6B58", tint = "#E0F0EC", text = "#0E6B58")
)
header_label <- c(Susztak = "Susztak DKD cohort",
                  KPMP_DKD = "KPMP DKD cohort",
                  KPMP_HKD = "KPMP HKD cohort")

# sample numbers per cohort
nums <- data.frame(
  cohort   = c("Susztak", "KPMP_DKD", "KPMP_HKD"),
  total    = c(6, 30, 27),
  passqc   = c(6, 29, 23),
  deg      = c(3, 14,  9),
  qc_excl  = c(NA, 1,  4),    # NA = no QC exclusion (no label drawn)
  deg_excl = c(3, 15, 14),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Rounded-rectangle helper -> polygon vertices --------------------------------
round_rect <- function(xc, yc, w, h, r = 0.13, n = 16) {
  x0 <- xc - w/2; x1 <- xc + w/2
  y0 <- yc - h/2; y1 <- yc + h/2
  r  <- min(r, w/2, h/2)
  arc <- function(cx, cy, a0, a1) {
    t <- seq(a0, a1, length.out = n)
    data.frame(x = cx + r * cos(t), y = cy + r * sin(t))
  }
  rbind(
    arc(x1 - r, y0 + r, -pi/2, 0),     # bottom-right
    arc(x1 - r, y1 - r,  0,    pi/2),  # top-right
    arc(x0 + r, y1 - r,  pi/2, pi),    # top-left
    arc(x0 + r, y0 + r,  pi,   3*pi/2) # bottom-left
  )
}

# Build geometry --------------------------------------------------------------
boxes  <- list()     # polygon data for all boxes
texts  <- list()     # title / n-value text
arrows <- list()     # connector segments
excl   <- list()     # exclusion labels
gid    <- 0

add_box <- function(xc, yc, w, h, fill, border, lwd = 0.8) {
  gid <<- gid + 1
  poly <- round_rect(xc, yc, w, h, r = corner_r)
  poly$grp <- gid; poly$fill <- fill; poly$border <- border; poly$lwd <- lwd
  boxes[[length(boxes) + 1]] <<- poly
}

for (ch in names(col_x)) {
  x <- col_x[[ch]]; p <- pal[[ch]]
  rn <- nums[nums$cohort == ch, ]

  # header (solid colour, white text)
  add_box(x, y_head, box_w, h_head, fill = p$header, border = p$header)
  texts[[length(texts) + 1]] <- data.frame(
    x = x, y = y_head, lab = header_label[[ch]],
    col = "white", face = "bold", size = 3.7, italic = FALSE)

  # three flow boxes (Total = white; QC & DEG = light tint)
  flow <- list(
    list(y = y_total, h = h_box, fill = "white", title = "Total samples",      n = rn$total),
    list(y = y_qc,    h = h_box, fill = p$tint,  title = "Passed QC",            n = rn$passqc),
    list(y = y_deg,   h = h_deg, fill = p$tint,  title = "Included in DEG analysis", n = rn$deg)
  )
  for (b in flow) {
    add_box(x, b$y, box_w, b$h, fill = b$fill, border = p$border, lwd = 0.9)
    texts[[length(texts) + 1]] <- data.frame(
      x = x, y = b$y + 0.17, lab = b$title, col = "#1A1A1A",
      face = "plain", size = 3.3, italic = FALSE)
    texts[[length(texts) + 1]] <- data.frame(
      x = x, y = b$y - 0.20, lab = paste0("n = ", b$n), col = "#1A1A1A",
      face = "plain", size = 3.3, italic = TRUE)
  }

  # arrows between boxes (coloured, closed head)
  arrows[[length(arrows) + 1]] <- data.frame(
    x = x, xend = x,
    y    = c(y_total - h_box/2, y_qc - h_box/2),
    yend = c(y_qc + h_box/2,    y_deg + h_deg/2),
    col  = p$border)

  # QC exclusion label (right of upper arrow); skip if NA
  if (!is.na(rn$qc_excl)) {
    excl[[length(excl) + 1]] <- data.frame(
      x = x + box_w/2 - 0.95, y = (y_total - h_box/2 + y_qc + h_box/2)/2,
      lab = paste0("Excluded by QC: n = ", rn$qc_excl),
      col = p$text, hjust = 0, size = 2.7)
  }
  # DEG exclusion label (below DEG box, centred)
  excl[[length(excl) + 1]] <- data.frame(
    x = x, y = y_deg - h_deg/2 - 0.33,
    lab = paste0("Excluded from DEG: n = ", rn$deg_excl),
    col = p$text, hjust = 0.5, size = 2.7)
}

boxes_df  <- do.call(rbind, boxes)
texts_df  <- do.call(rbind, texts)
arrows_df <- do.call(rbind, arrows)
excl_df   <- do.call(rbind, excl)

# outer frame + title + footnote
frame_df <- round_rect((min(col_x) - box_w/2 - 0.4 + max(col_x) + box_w/2 + 1.7)/2,
                       3.95, (max(col_x) + box_w/2 + 1.7) - (min(col_x) - box_w/2 - 0.4),
                       7.3, r = 0.06, n = 16)

# Plot ------------------------------------------------------------------------
p <- ggplot() +
  # outer frame
  geom_path(data = frame_df, aes(x, y), colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  # boxes
  geom_polygon(data = boxes_df,
               aes(x, y, group = grp, fill = fill, colour = border),
               linewidth = 0.9) +
  scale_fill_identity() + scale_colour_identity() +
  # arrows
  geom_segment(data = arrows_df,
               aes(x = x, y = y, xend = xend, yend = yend, colour = col),
               linewidth = 0.9,
               arrow = arrow(type = "closed", length = unit(0.16, "cm"))) +
  # box text
  geom_text(data = texts_df,
            aes(x, y, label = lab, colour = col,
                fontface = ifelse(italic, "italic", face), size = size),
            family = base_family) +
  scale_size_identity() +
  # exclusion labels
  geom_text(data = excl_df,
            aes(x, y, label = lab, colour = col, hjust = hjust),
            size = 2.7, family = base_family) +
  # title
  annotate("text", x = mean(col_x), y = 7.15, label = "Cohort and sample flow",
           fontface = "bold", size = 6, family = base_family) +
  # footnote
  annotate("text", x = mean(col_x), y = 0.75,
           label = "QC, quality control; DEG, differential expression.",
           size = 3, colour = "#555555", family = base_family) +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 1, clip = "off") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none", plot.margin = margin(4, 4, 4, 4))

print(p)

# Save ------------------------------------------------------------------------
ts <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
ggsave(sprintf("Fig1B_cohort_sample_flow_%s.png", ts), p,
       width = 10, height = 6.9, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
ggsave(sprintf("Fig1B_cohort_sample_flow_%s.pdf", ts), p,
       width = 10, height = 6.9, bg = "white")

message("Saved Fig1B_cohort_sample_flow_", ts, ".png / .pdf")

```
```{r}
# Figure 1B — Cohort and sample flow
# GWR / DKD spatial transcriptomics manuscript
#
# Output:
#   - PNG 300 dpi
#   - PDF vector
#
# Main fixes:
#   - Symmetric x-axis limits
#   - Properly centered title / footnote / frame
#   - Wider boxes
#   - Wrapped long labels to avoid text overflow

library(ggplot2)
library(grid)

# Font
base_family <- ""   # set to "Arial" or "Helvetica" if available

# PARAMETERS

# Column centers
col_x <- c(
  Susztak  = 2.0,
  KPMP_DKD = 5.4,
  KPMP_HKD = 8.8
)

# Box size
box_w <- 2.75     # larger than before to prevent text overflow

# Row centers
y_head  <- 6.45
y_total <- 5.25
y_qc    <- 3.65
y_deg   <- 2.05

# Box heights
h_head <- 0.60
h_box  <- 0.90
h_deg  <- 1.00

corner_r <- 0.13

# Symmetric outer layout
x_left  <- min(col_x) - box_w / 2 - 0.40
x_right <- max(col_x) + box_w / 2 + 0.40
x_mid   <- (x_left + x_right) / 2

y_bottom <- 0.45
y_top    <- 7.55

# Colors

pal <- list(
  Susztak = list(
    header = "#1F3864",
    border = "#1F3864",
    tint   = "#E8EEF6",
    text   = "#1F3864"
  ),
  KPMP_DKD = list(
    header = "#ED7D31",
    border = "#C55A11",
    tint   = "#FBE9DA",
    text   = "#B5560F"
  ),
  KPMP_HKD = list(
    header = "#138D75",
    border = "#0E6B58",
    tint   = "#E0F0EC",
    text   = "#0E6B58"
  )
)

header_label <- c(
  Susztak  = "Published DKD cohort",
  KPMP_DKD = "KPMP DKD cohort",
  KPMP_HKD = "KPMP HKD cohort"
)

# Sample numbers

nums <- data.frame(
  cohort   = c("Susztak", "KPMP_DKD", "KPMP_HKD"),
  total    = c(6, 30, 27),
  passqc   = c(6, 29, 23),
  deg      = c(3, 14, 9),
  qc_excl  = c(NA, 1, 4),
  deg_excl = c(3, 15, 14),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Helper: rounded rectangle polygon

round_rect <- function(xc, yc, w, h, r = 0.13, n = 20) {
  x0 <- xc - w / 2
  x1 <- xc + w / 2
  y0 <- yc - h / 2
  y1 <- yc + h / 2
  
  r <- min(r, w / 2, h / 2)
  
  arc <- function(cx, cy, a0, a1) {
    t <- seq(a0, a1, length.out = n)
    data.frame(
      x = cx + r * cos(t),
      y = cy + r * sin(t)
    )
  }
  
  rbind(
    arc(x1 - r, y0 + r, -pi / 2, 0),
    arc(x1 - r, y1 - r, 0, pi / 2),
    arc(x0 + r, y1 - r, pi / 2, pi),
    arc(x0 + r, y0 + r, pi, 3 * pi / 2)
  )
}

# Build geometry

boxes  <- list()
texts  <- list()
arrows <- list()
excl   <- list()
gid    <- 0

add_box <- function(xc, yc, w, h, fill, border, lwd = 0.9) {
  gid <<- gid + 1
  poly <- round_rect(xc, yc, w, h, r = corner_r)
  poly$grp <- gid
  poly$fill <- fill
  poly$border <- border
  poly$lwd <- lwd
  boxes[[length(boxes) + 1]] <<- poly
}

for (ch in names(col_x)) {
  
  x <- col_x[[ch]]
  p <- pal[[ch]]
  rn <- nums[nums$cohort == ch, ]
  
  # Header
  add_box(
    xc = x,
    yc = y_head,
    w = box_w,
    h = h_head,
    fill = p$header,
    border = p$header
  )
  
  texts[[length(texts) + 1]] <- data.frame(
    x = x,
    y = y_head,
    lab = header_label[[ch]],
    col = "white",
    face = "bold",
    size = 4.0,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Flow boxes
  flow <- list(
    list(
      y = y_total,
      h = h_box,
      fill = "white",
      title = "Total samples",
      n = rn$total
    ),
    list(
      y = y_qc,
      h = h_box,
      fill = p$tint,
      title = "Passed QC",
      n = rn$passqc
    ),
    list(
      y = y_deg,
      h = h_deg,
      fill = p$tint,
      title = "Included in\nDEG analysis",
      n = rn$deg
    )
  )
  
  for (b in flow) {
    
    add_box(
      xc = x,
      yc = b$y,
      w = box_w,
      h = b$h,
      fill = b$fill,
      border = p$border
    )
    
    # Title inside box
    texts[[length(texts) + 1]] <- data.frame(
      x = x,
      y = b$y + 0.18,
      lab = b$title,
      col = "#1A1A1A",
      face = "plain",
      size = 3.6,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    # n value
    texts[[length(texts) + 1]] <- data.frame(
      x = x,
      y = b$y - 0.25,
      lab = paste0("italic(n) == ", b$n),
      col = "#1A1A1A",
      face = "plain",
      size = 3.6,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }
  
  # Arrows
  arrows[[length(arrows) + 1]] <- data.frame(
    x = x,
    xend = x,
    y = y_total - h_box / 2,
    yend = y_qc + h_box / 2,
    col = p$border,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  arrows[[length(arrows) + 1]] <- data.frame(
    x = x,
    xend = x,
    y = y_qc - h_box / 2,
    yend = y_deg + h_deg / 2,
    col = p$border,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # QC exclusion label
  if (!is.na(rn$qc_excl)) {
    excl[[length(excl) + 1]] <- data.frame(
      x = x + 0.45,
      y = 4.45,
      lab = paste0("Excluded by QC: n = ", rn$qc_excl),
      col = p$text,
      hjust = 0,
      size = 3.1,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }
  
  # DEG exclusion label
  excl[[length(excl) + 1]] <- data.frame(
    x = x,
    y = y_deg - h_deg / 2 - 0.36,
    lab = paste0("Excluded from DEG: n = ", rn$deg_excl),
    col = p$text,
    hjust = 0.5,
    size = 3.1,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

boxes_df  <- do.call(rbind, boxes)
texts_df  <- do.call(rbind, texts)
arrows_df <- do.call(rbind, arrows)
excl_df   <- do.call(rbind, excl)

# Outer frame
frame_df <- round_rect(
  xc = x_mid,
  yc = 3.95,
  w = x_right - x_left,
  h = 7.10,
  r = 0.06,
  n = 20
)

# Plot

p <- ggplot() +
  
  # Outer frame
  geom_polygon(
    data = frame_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y),
    fill = NA,
    colour = "black",
    linewidth = 0.5
  ) +
  
  # Boxes
  geom_polygon(
    data = boxes_df,
    aes(
      x = x,
      y = y,
      group = grp,
      fill = fill,
      colour = border
    ),
    linewidth = 0.9
  ) +
  
  scale_fill_identity() +
  scale_colour_identity() +
  
  # Arrows
  geom_segment(
    data = arrows_df,
    aes(
      x = x,
      y = y,
      xend = xend,
      yend = yend,
      colour = col
    ),
    linewidth = 0.9,
    arrow = arrow(
      type = "closed",
      length = unit(0.16, "cm")
    )
  ) +
  
  # Text in boxes
  geom_text(
    data = texts_df,
    aes(
      x = x,
      y = y,
      label = lab,
      colour = col,
      fontface = face,
      size = size
    ),
    hjust = 0.5,
    vjust = 0.5,
    lineheight = 0.95,
    family = base_family,
    parse = FALSE
  ) +
  
  scale_size_identity() +
  
  # Exclusion labels
  geom_text(
    data = excl_df,
    aes(
      x = x,
      y = y,
      label = lab,
      colour = col,
      hjust = hjust,
      size = size
    ),
    vjust = 0.5,
    family = base_family
  ) +
  
  # Title
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = x_mid,
    y = 7.10,
    label = "Cohort and sample flow",
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 6.6,
    family = base_family
  ) +
  
  # Footnote
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = x_mid,
    y = 0.82,
    label = "QC, quality control; DEG, differential expression.",
    size = 3.4,
    colour = "#555555",
    family = base_family
  ) +
  
  coord_fixed(
    ratio = 1,
    xlim = c(x_left, x_right),
    ylim = c(y_bottom, y_top),
    clip = "off"
  ) +
  
  theme_void() +
  
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(4, 4, 4, 4)
  )

print(p)
```

```{r}
# Save

ts <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")

ggsave(
  filename = sprintf("Fig1B_cohort_sample_flow_%s.png", ts),
  plot = p,
  width = 10.5,
  height = 6.8,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

ggsave(
  filename = sprintf("Fig1B_cohort_sample_flow_%s.pdf", ts),
  plot = p,
  width = 10.5,
  height = 6.8,
  bg = "white"
)

message("Saved Fig1B_cohort_sample_flow_", ts, ".png / .pdf")
```
